title: The Artificial Intelligence Debate Inspired By 'The AI Doc: Or How I Became An Apocaloptimist'
description: Where are we at, and where can we go?
content:
AI is everywhere. But what is AI? We are hearing people tell us that AI is already smarter than humans in a lot of ways. But what does that mean?

title: NHAI to deploy AI-enabled cameras on 40,000 km of NHs for monitoring
description: According to the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI), the idea is to enhance remote tracking and road condition assessments using high-resolution imagery and video data. The initiative leverages Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning for high-tech and data-driven operation and maintenance of national highways (NHs) in the country.

title: White House offers AI framework
description: WASHINGTON -- The White House said Friday that Congress should "preempt state AI laws" that it views as too burdensome, laying out a broad framework for how it wants Congress to address concerns about artificial intelligence without curbing growth or innovation in the sector.

title: AI-Based ECG Analysis Shows Higher Accuracy In Identifying Occlusive Heart Attack, Study Finds
description: An artificial intelligence (AI)-based method for interpreting ECGs performed better than standard approaches in detecting occlusive myocardial infarction (MI).
content:

title: The Alarming Research on the Impact of ‘AI Companions’ and Widespread Loneliness
description: The popularity of "AI companions" is exploding as people turn to artificial intelligence to serve as their friend or even life partner. But as Wynton Hall's new book CODE RED documents, the research on the psychological impact of AI companions is alarming — far from filling an emotional gap in the lives of humans, these "companions" are making people lonelier.
